name: locking
description: Locking rules are unchanged from classic Qwixx: the right-most cell (index 10) needs >=5 prior marks and locking adds one bonus cross. No chain uses index 10, so a chain co-mark can never itself lock a row.

steps.note: only 4 prior marks - still not enough
red[4] (red 6) is a chain space - marking it auto-crosses yellow[4] too, and gives red its 5th mark
now >=5 prior marks - locking is legal; the lock itself is NOT a chain space, so no partner is auto-crossed by it
red is locked - no further marks, even on a chain space (red[9]/red 11 is chained to yellow[9]/yellow 11)
undo the lock: red unlocks, its lock-bonus cross is removed, back to 5 crosses (the chain co-mark from an EARLIER action is untouched)
